creator: asiciliano@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 256701
diff created by git diff --staged > ../`make -VPKGNAME`.diff in /usr/ports/www/edbrowse

Update edbrowse to 3.8.10

Deleted patches (upstream fix), and added MAKE_ARGS.

make reports:

a false "Warning: you might not need LIB_DEPENDS on libreadline.so.8".

And an output error for a dep: "Error: /usr/local/bin/edbrowse is linked to /usr/local/lib/libquickjs.so which does not have a SONAME.  lang/quickjs needs to be fixed." bug #275087

Testing:

# portlint -C
# portfmt -i /usr/ports/www/edbrowse/Makefile
# portclippy /usr/ports/www/edbrowse/Makefile
# port test /usr/ports/www/edbrowse
# poudriere testport -j 142Ramd64 -i -o www/edbrowse
# poudriere testport -j 150Camd64 -i -o www/edbrowse
